title: Day 4 Lesson 2 ( Video )Talking about this evening plans
html:
Day 4 - Lesson 2

こんばんの　よていを　はなす = Talking about this evening's plans

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　= Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): がくせい ふたり (Two students)

The new words for this lesson are:

こんばん (konban) = this evening

おんがく (ongaku) = music

ききます (kikimas) = to listen

てれび (terebi) = tv

みます (mimas) = to watch

ほん (hon) = book

よみます (yomimas) = to read

それから (sore kara) = after that

ゲームをします (geemu shimas) = play video games

します (shimas) = to do ("to play" in this example)
